================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 D4 7E 4F AC CC
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1894
Reflected CC   : 0x00
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 14

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1894
ReflectedCC  : 0x00
PayloadLen   : 14

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1894

[PAYLOAD HEX]
59 6F 73 69 20 49 6E 20 53 70 61 63 65 00 

[RETURN VALUE]
59 6F 73 69 20 49 6E 20 53 70 61 63 65 00 

[BINARY DATA]
